name: Paper Search Pro
description_en: Find academic papers across five sources (OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, CrossRef, PubMed, arXiv) with depth from a 5-minute quick scan to a 3-hour audit prep.
description_zh: 跨五大来源(OpenAlex、Semantic Scholar、CrossRef、PubMed、arXiv)检索学术论文,深度可从 5 分钟快扫到 3 小时审计级。
long_en: Outputs an HTML report plus BibTeX/RIS/CSV exports and a PRISMA-S log for scoping and systematic reviews.
long_zh: 输出 HTML 报告以及 BibTeX/RIS/CSV 导出与 PRISMA-S 日志,适用于范围综述与系统综述。
sec_note_en: Queries public scholarly APIs; verify retrieved metadata before citing.
sec_note_zh: 查询公开学术 API;引用前请核验检索到的元数据。
